Image is missing alt attribute

<img decoding="async" src="https://gassnova.no/app/uploads/2024/02/Logo-Gassnova.png"/>
Add alt attribute describing the image, or alt='' if decorative

1.3.1 Informasjon og relasjoner (2 avvik)
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

First heading is h3, should start with h1

<h3 class="coi-consent-banner__no-cookies">Ingen informasjonskapsler i denne kategorien</h3>
Start your heading structure with h1
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Radio/checkbox group 'tabs' not wrapped in fieldset with legend

<input class="coi-consent-banner__category-expander" id="coi-consent-banner__category-expander-cookie_cat_necessary" name="tabs" type="checkbox"/>
Wrap related radio buttons or checkboxes in <fieldset> with <legend>
2.4.4 Formål med lenke (126 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a href="https://cookieinformation.com/" target="_blank">Cookie Information</a>
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link uses javascript: URL

<a class="coi-banner__policy" href="javascript:TogglePage(this, 'coiPage-3');" onkeypress="TogglePage(this, 'coiPage-3')">Les mer om informasjonskapsler</a>
Use a button element for actions, or use href with progressive enhancement
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a aria-label="Googles retningslinjer for personvern" class="coi-banner__google-privacy-policy" href="https://business.safety.google/intl/no/privacy" target="_blank">Googles retningslinjer for personv
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link text is a URL

<a href="https://cookieinformation.com/cookie-and-privacy-policy/" target="_blank">https://cookieinformation.com/cookie-and-privacy-policy/</a>
Replace URL with descriptive text that explains the link destination

3.3.2 Ledetekster eller instruksjoner (3 avvik)
Testregel 3.3.2 (3.3.2 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Form input only has placeholder, no proper label

<input class="input-header hide search-field" name="s" placeholder="Søk..." type="text"/>
Add a <label> element with for attribute, or aria-label. Placeholder disappears when typing.
Testregel 3.3.2 (3.3.2 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Form input only has placeholder, no proper label

<input class="input-header hide search-field" name="s" placeholder="Søk..." type="text"/>
Add a <label> element with for attribute, or aria-label. Placeholder disappears when typing.
Testregel 3.3.2 (3.3.2 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Form input has no label

<textarea class="g-recaptcha-response" id="g-recaptcha-response-100000" name="g-recaptcha-response" style="width: 250px; height: 40px; border: 1px solid rgb(193, 193, 193); margin: 10px 25px; padding:
Add a <label> element with for attribute pointing to input id
2.1.1 Tastatur (2 avvik)
Testregel 2.1.1 (2.1.1 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

<div> with onclick has no tabindex - not keyboard focusable

<div id="Coi-Renew" onclick="javascript:CookieConsent.renew();" style="display: none;"> <svg id="coi-renew-svg" style="enable-background:new 0 0 304.4 304.4;" version="1.1" viewbox="0 0 304.4 304.4" x
Add tabindex='0' to make element focusable, or use a button/link
Testregel 2.1.1 (2.1.1 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Interactive button has tabindex='-1' - not keyboard accessible

<button aria-controls="slick-slide11" aria-label="2 of 2" id="slick-slide-control11" role="tab" tabindex="-1" type="button">2</button>
Remove tabindex='-1' unless element is in an inactive state
2.4.1 Hopp over blokker (1 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.1 (2.4.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Page has no skip link to bypass navigation

<body>
Add a skip link at the start of the page: <a href='#main'>Hopp til hovedinnhold</a>
4.1.2 Navn, rolle, verdi (50 avvik)
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

iframe is missing title attribute

<iframe height="0" src="https://www.googletagmanager.com/ns.html?id=GTM-W6ZHGVJ" style="display:none;visibility:hidden" width="0"></iframe>
Add descriptive title attribute to iframe
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

iframe is missing title attribute

<iframe style="display: none;"></iframe>
Add descriptive title attribute to iframe
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Role 'tab' requires aria-selected attribute

<button aria-controls="slick-slide11" aria-label="2 of 2" id="slick-slide-control11" role="tab" tabindex="-1" type="button">2</button>
Add aria-selected attribute to element with role='tab'
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

aria-describedby references non-existent ID: 'slick-slide-control00'

<div aria-describedby="slick-slide-control00" aria-hidden="false" class="slide slick-slide slick-current slick-active" data-slick-index="0" id="slick-slide00" role="tabpanel" style="width: 462px;" tab
Ensure the referenced ID exists on the page
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Focusable element is inside aria-hidden container

<input class="coi-consent-banner__category-expander" id="coi-consent-banner__category-expander-cookie_cat_necessary" name="tabs" type="checkbox"/>
Remove from tab order with tabindex='-1' or remove aria-hidden

Focusable element is inside aria-hidden container

<input aria-label=" Uklassifiserte" class="coi-consent-banner__category-expander" id="coi-consent-banner__category-expander-cookie_cat_unclassified" name="tabs" type="checkbox"/>
Remove from tab order with tabindex='-1' or remove aria-hidden

Knowledge Sharing 2026, CCS&CDR Summit - Gassnova

https://gassnova.no/gassnova-knowledge-sharing-summit-2026
Avvik: 179 | Bestått: 130
1.1.1 Ikke-tekstlig innhold (11 avvik)
Testregel 1.1.1a (1.1.1 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

SVG is missing accessible name

<svg id="coi-renew-svg" style="enable-background:new 0 0 304.4 304.4;" version="1.1" viewbox="0 0 304.4 304.4" x="0px" xml:space="preserve" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" xmlns:xlink="http://www.w
Add <title> element inside SVG, or aria-label attribute. Use role='presentation' if decorative

SERIOUS

1.3.1 Informasjon og relasjoner (2 avvik)
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

First heading is h3, should start with h1

<h3 class="coi-consent-banner__no-cookies">Ingen informasjonskapsler i denne kategorien</h3>
Start your heading structure with h1
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Radio/checkbox group 'tabs' not wrapped in fieldset with legend

<input class="coi-consent-banner__category-expander" id="coi-consent-banner__category-expander-cookie_cat_necessary" name="tabs" type="checkbox"/>
Wrap related radio buttons or checkboxes in <fieldset> with <legend>
2.4.4 Formål med lenke (113 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a href="https://cookieinformation.com/" target="_blank">Cookie Information</a>
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link uses javascript: URL

<a class="coi-banner__policy" href="javascript:TogglePage(this, 'coiPage-3');" onkeypress="TogglePage(this, 'coiPage-3')">Les mer om informasjonskapsler</a>
Use a button element for actions, or use href with progressive enhancement
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a aria-label="Googles retningslinjer for personvern" class="coi-banner__google-privacy-policy" href="https://business.safety.google/intl/no/privacy" target="_blank">Googles retningslinjer for personv
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link text is a URL

<a href="https://cookieinformation.com/cookie-and-privacy-policy/" target="_blank">https://cookieinformation.com/cookie-and-privacy-policy/</a>
Replace URL with descriptive text that explains the link destination

Add alt attribute describing the image, or alt='' if decorative

1.3.1 Informasjon og relasjoner (2 avvik)
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

First heading is h3, should start with h1

<h3 class="coi-consent-banner__no-cookies">Ingen informasjonskapsler i denne kategorien</h3>
Start your heading structure with h1
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Radio/checkbox group 'tabs' not wrapped in fieldset with legend

<input class="coi-consent-banner__category-expander" id="coi-consent-banner__category-expander-cookie_cat_necessary" name="tabs" type="checkbox"/>
Wrap related radio buttons or checkboxes in <fieldset> with <legend>
2.4.4 Formål med lenke (126 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a href="https://cookieinformation.com/" target="_blank">Cookie Information</a>
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link uses javascript: URL

<a class="coi-banner__policy" href="javascript:TogglePage(this, 'coiPage-3');" onkeypress="TogglePage(this, 'coiPage-3')">Les mer om informasjonskapsler</a>
Use a button element for actions, or use href with progressive enhancement

3.3.2 Ledetekster eller instruksjoner (3 avvik)
Testregel 3.3.2 (3.3.2 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Form input only has placeholder, no proper label

<input class="input-header hide search-field" name="s" placeholder="Søk..." type="text"/>
Add a <label> element with for attribute, or aria-label. Placeholder disappears when typing.
Testregel 3.3.2 (3.3.2 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Form input only has placeholder, no proper label

<input class="input-header hide search-field" name="s" placeholder="Søk..." type="text"/>
Add a <label> element with for attribute, or aria-label. Placeholder disappears when typing.
Testregel 3.3.2 (3.3.2 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Form input has no label

<textarea class="g-recaptcha-response" id="g-recaptcha-response-100000" name="g-recaptcha-response" style="width: 250px; height: 40px; border: 1px solid rgb(193, 193, 193); margin: 10px 25px; padding:
Add a <label> element with for attribute pointing to input id
2.1.1 Tastatur (2 avvik)
Testregel 2.1.1 (2.1.1 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

<div> with onclick has no tabindex - not keyboard focusable

<div id="Coi-Renew" onclick="javascript:CookieConsent.renew();" style="display: none;"> <svg id="coi-renew-svg" style="enable-background:new 0 0 304.4 304.4;" version="1.1" viewbox="0 0 304.4 304.4" x
Add tabindex='0' to make element focusable, or use a button/link
Testregel 2.1.1 (2.1.1 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Interactive button has tabindex='-1' - not keyboard accessible

<button aria-controls="slick-slide11" aria-label="2 of 2" id="slick-slide-control11" role="tab" tabindex="-1" type="button">2</button>
Remove tabindex='-1' unless element is in an inactive state
2.4.1 Hopp over blokker (1 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.1 (2.4.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Page has no skip link to bypass navigation

<body>
Add a skip link at the start of the page: <a href='#main'>Hopp til hovedinnhold</a>
4.1.2 Navn, rolle, verdi (50 avvik)
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

iframe is missing title attribute

<iframe height="0" src="https://www.googletagmanager.com/ns.html?id=GTM-W6ZHGVJ" style="display:none;visibility:hidden" width="0"></iframe>
Add descriptive title attribute to iframe
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

iframe is missing title attribute

<iframe style="display: none;"></iframe>
Add descriptive title attribute to iframe
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Role 'tab' requires aria-selected attribute

<button aria-controls="slick-slide11" aria-label="2 of 2" id="slick-slide-control11" role="tab" tabindex="-1" type="button">2</button>
Add aria-selected attribute to element with role='tab'
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

aria-describedby references non-existent ID: 'slick-slide-control00'

<div aria-describedby="slick-slide-control00" aria-hidden="false" class="slide slick-slide slick-current slick-active" data-slick-index="0" id="slick-slide00" role="tabpanel" style="width: 462px;" tab
Ensure the referenced ID exists on the page
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Focusable element is inside aria-hidden container

<input class="coi-consent-banner__category-expander" id="coi-consent-banner__category-expander-cookie_cat_necessary" name="tabs" type="checkbox"/>
Remove from tab order with tabindex='-1' or remove aria-hidden

SERIOUS

1.3.1 Informasjon og relasjoner (2 avvik)
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

First heading is h3, should start with h1

<h3 class="coi-consent-banner__no-cookies">Ingen informasjonskapsler i denne kategorien</h3>
Start your heading structure with h1
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Radio/checkbox group 'tabs' not wrapped in fieldset with legend

<input class="coi-consent-banner__category-expander" id="coi-consent-banner__category-expander-cookie_cat_necessary" name="tabs" type="checkbox"/>
Wrap related radio buttons or checkboxes in <fieldset> with <legend>
2.4.4 Formål med lenke (118 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a href="https://cookieinformation.com/" target="_blank">Cookie Information</a>
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link uses javascript: URL

<a class="coi-banner__policy" href="javascript:TogglePage(this, 'coiPage-3');" onkeypress="TogglePage(this, 'coiPage-3')">Les mer om informasjonskapsler</a>
Use a button element for actions, or use href with progressive enhancement
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a aria-label="Googles retningslinjer for personvern" class="coi-banner__google-privacy-policy" href="https://business.safety.google/intl/no/privacy" target="_blank">Googles retningslinjer for personv
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link text is a URL

<a href="https://cookieinformation.com/cookie-and-privacy-policy/" target="_blank">https://cookieinformation.com/cookie-and-privacy-policy/</a>
Replace URL with descriptive text that explains the link destination

3.3.2 Ledetekster eller instruksjoner (3 avvik)
Testregel 3.3.2 (3.3.2 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Form input only has placeholder, no proper label

<input class="input-header hide search-field" name="s" placeholder="Søk..." type="text"/>
Add a <label> element with for attribute, or aria-label. Placeholder disappears when typing.
Testregel 3.3.2 (3.3.2 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Form input only has placeholder, no proper label

<input class="input-header hide search-field" name="s" placeholder="Søk..." type="text"/>
Add a <label> element with for attribute, or aria-label. Placeholder disappears when typing.

CRITICAL

Form input has no label

<textarea class="g-recaptcha-response" id="g-recaptcha-response-100000" name="g-recaptcha-response" style="width: 250px; height: 40px; border: 1px solid rgb(193, 193, 193); margin: 10px 25px; padding:
Add a <label> element with for attribute pointing to input id
2.1.1 Tastatur (1 avvik)
Testregel 2.1.1 (2.1.1 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

<div> with onclick has no tabindex - not keyboard focusable

<div id="Coi-Renew" onclick="javascript:CookieConsent.renew();" style="display: none;"> <svg id="coi-renew-svg" style="enable-background:new 0 0 304.4 304.4;" version="1.1" viewbox="0 0 304.4 304.4" x
Add tabindex='0' to make element focusable, or use a button/link

Page has no skip link to bypass navigation

<body>

CCS Ordliste - Gassnova

https://gassnova.no/ccs-ordliste
Avvik: 165 | Bestått: 154
1.1.1 Ikke-tekstlig innhold (1 avvik)
Testregel 1.1.1a (1.1.1 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

SVG is missing accessible name

<svg id="coi-renew-svg" style="enable-background:new 0 0 304.4 304.4;" version="1.1" viewbox="0 0 304.4 304.4" x="0px" xml:space="preserve" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" xmlns:xlink="http://www.w
Add <title> element inside SVG, or aria-label attribute. Use role='presentation' if decorative
1.3.1 Informasjon og relasjoner (2 avvik)
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

First heading is h3, should start with h1

<h3 class="coi-consent-banner__no-cookies">Ingen informasjonskapsler i denne kategorien</h3>
Start your heading structure with h1
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Radio/checkbox group 'tabs' not wrapped in fieldset with legend

<input class="coi-consent-banner__category-expander" id="coi-consent-banner__category-expander-cookie_cat_necessary" name="tabs" type="checkbox"/>
Wrap related radio buttons or checkboxes in <fieldset> with <legend>
2.4.4 Formål med lenke (108 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a href="https://cookieinformation.com/" target="_blank">Cookie Information</a>
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link uses javascript: URL

<a class="coi-banner__policy" href="javascript:TogglePage(this, 'coiPage-3');" onkeypress="TogglePage(this, 'coiPage-3')">Les mer om informasjonskapsler</a>
Use a button element for actions, or use href with progressive enhancement
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a aria-label="Googles retningslinjer for personvern" class="coi-banner__google-privacy-policy" href="https://business.safety.google/intl/no/privacy" target="_blank">Googles retningslinjer for personv
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link text is a URL

<a href="https://cookieinformation.com/cookie-and-privacy-policy/" target="_blank">https://cookieinformation.com/cookie-and-privacy-policy/</a>
Replace URL with descriptive text that explains the link destination
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a href="https://cookieinformation.com/cookie-and-privacy-policy/" target="_blank">https://cookieinformation.com/cookie-and-privacy-policy/</a>
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)

3.3.2 Ledetekster eller instruksjoner (3 avvik)
Testregel 3.3.2 (3.3.2 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Form input only has placeholder, no proper label

<input class="input-header hide search-field" name="s" placeholder="Søk..." type="text"/>
Add a <label> element with for attribute, or aria-label. Placeholder disappears when typing.
Testregel 3.3.2 (3.3.2 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Form input only has placeholder, no proper label

<input class="input-header hide search-field" name="s" placeholder="Søk..." type="text"/>
Add a <label> element with for attribute, or aria-label. Placeholder disappears when typing.
Testregel 3.3.2 (3.3.2 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Form input has no label

<textarea class="g-recaptcha-response" id="g-recaptcha-response-100000" name="g-recaptcha-response" style="width: 250px; height: 40px; border: 1px solid rgb(193, 193, 193); margin: 10px 25px; padding:
Add a <label> element with for attribute pointing to input id
2.1.1 Tastatur (1 avvik)
Testregel 2.1.1 (2.1.1 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

<div> with onclick has no tabindex - not keyboard focusable

<div id="Coi-Renew" onclick="javascript:CookieConsent.renew();" style="display: none;"> <svg id="coi-renew-svg" style="enable-background:new 0 0 304.4 304.4;" version="1.1" viewbox="0 0 304.4 304.4" x
Add tabindex='0' to make element focusable, or use a button/link
2.4.1 Hopp over blokker (1 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.1 (2.4.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Page has no skip link to bypass navigation

<body>
Add a skip link at the start of the page: <a href='#main'>Hopp til hovedinnhold</a>
4.1.1 Parsing (1 avvik)
Testregel 4.1.1 (4.1.1 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Duplicate ID found: 'primary' appears 2 times

id="primary"
Each ID must be unique on the page
4.1.2 Navn, rolle, verdi (48 avvik)

SERIOUS

iframe is missing title attribute

<iframe height="0" src="https://www.googletagmanager.com/ns.html?id=GTM-W6ZHGVJ" style="display:none;visibility:hidden" width="0"></iframe>

SERIOUS

iframe is missing title attribute

<iframe style="display: none;"></iframe>

<a href="https://policies.google.com/technologies/partner-sites?hl=en" target="_blank">https://policies.google.com/technologies/partner-sites?hl=en</a>
Remove from tab order with tabindex='-1' or remove aria-hidden
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Focusable element is inside aria-hidden container

<input aria-label=" Uklassifiserte" class="coi-consent-banner__category-expander" id="coi-consent-banner__category-expander-cookie_cat_unclassified" name="tabs" type="checkbox"/>
Remove from tab order with tabindex='-1' or remove aria-hidden

Nyheter - Gassnova

https://gassnova.no/nyheter
Avvik: 165 | Bestått: 106
1.1.1 Ikke-tekstlig innhold (3 avvik)
Testregel 1.1.1a (1.1.1 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

SVG is missing accessible name

<svg id="coi-renew-svg" style="enable-background:new 0 0 304.4 304.4;" version="1.1" viewbox="0 0 304.4 304.4" x="0px" xml:space="preserve" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" xmlns:xlink="http://www.w
Add <title> element inside SVG, or aria-label attribute. Use role='presentation' if decorative
Testregel 1.1.1a (1.1.1 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

SVG is missing accessible name

<svg height="7.41" viewbox="0 0 12 7.41" width="12" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"> <path d="M10.59 0L6 4.58 1.41 0 0 1.41l6 6 6-6z"></path> </svg>
Add <title> element inside SVG, or aria-label attribute. Use role='presentation' if decorative
Testregel 1.1.1a (1.1.1 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

SVG is missing accessible name

<svg height="7.41" viewbox="0 0 12 7.41" width="12" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"> <path d="M10.59 0L6 4.58 1.41 0 0 1.41l6 6 6-6z"></path> </svg>
Add <title> element inside SVG, or aria-label attribute. Use role='presentation' if decorative
1.3.1 Informasjon og relasjoner (2 avvik)
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

First heading is h3, should start with h1

<h3 class="coi-consent-banner__no-cookies">Ingen informasjonskapsler i denne kategorien</h3>
Start your heading structure with h1
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Radio/checkbox group 'tabs' not wrapped in fieldset with legend

<input class="coi-consent-banner__category-expander" id="coi-consent-banner__category-expander-cookie_cat_necessary" name="tabs" type="checkbox"/>
Wrap related radio buttons or checkboxes in <fieldset> with <legend>
2.4.4 Formål med lenke (107 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a href="https://cookieinformation.com/" target="_blank">Cookie Information</a>
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link uses javascript: URL

<a class="coi-banner__policy" href="javascript:TogglePage(this, 'coiPage-3');" onkeypress="TogglePage(this, 'coiPage-3')">Les mer om informasjonskapsler</a>
Use a button element for actions, or use href with progressive enhancement
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a aria-label="Googles retningslinjer for personvern" class="coi-banner__google-privacy-policy" href="https://business.safety.google/intl/no/privacy" target="_blank">Googles retningslinjer for personv

3.3.2 Ledetekster eller instruksjoner (3 avvik)
Testregel 3.3.2 (3.3.2 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Form input only has placeholder, no proper label

<input class="input-header hide search-field" name="s" placeholder="Søk..." type="text"/>
Add a <label> element with for attribute, or aria-label. Placeholder disappears when typing.
Testregel 3.3.2 (3.3.2 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Form input only has placeholder, no proper label

<input class="input-header hide search-field" name="s" placeholder="Søk..." type="text"/>
Add a <label> element with for attribute, or aria-label. Placeholder disappears when typing.
Testregel 3.3.2 (3.3.2 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Form input has no label

<textarea class="g-recaptcha-response" id="g-recaptcha-response-100000" name="g-recaptcha-response" style="width: 250px; height: 40px; border: 1px solid rgb(193, 193, 193); margin: 10px 25px; padding:
Add a <label> element with for attribute pointing to input id
2.1.1 Tastatur (1 avvik)
Testregel 2.1.1 (2.1.1 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

<div> with onclick has no tabindex - not keyboard focusable

<div id="Coi-Renew" onclick="javascript:CookieConsent.renew();" style="display: none;"> <svg id="coi-renew-svg" style="enable-background:new 0 0 304.4 304.4;" version="1.1" viewbox="0 0 304.4 304.4" x
Add tabindex='0' to make element focusable, or use a button/link
2.4.1 Hopp over blokker (1 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.1 (2.4.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Page has no skip link to bypass navigation

<body>
Add a skip link at the start of the page: <a href='#main'>Hopp til hovedinnhold</a>
4.1.2 Navn, rolle, verdi (48 avvik)

iframe is missing title attribute

https://gassnova.no/?page_id=529
Avvik: 163 | Bestått: 106
1.1.1 Ikke-tekstlig innhold (1 avvik)
Testregel 1.1.1a (1.1.1 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

SVG is missing accessible name

<svg id="coi-renew-svg" style="enable-background:new 0 0 304.4 304.4;" version="1.1" viewbox="0 0 304.4 304.4" x="0px" xml:space="preserve" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" xmlns:xlink="http://www.w
Add <title> element inside SVG, or aria-label attribute. Use role='presentation' if decorative
1.3.1 Informasjon og relasjoner (2 avvik)
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

First heading is h3, should start with h1

<h3 class="coi-consent-banner__no-cookies">Ingen informasjonskapsler i denne kategorien</h3>
Start your heading structure with h1
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Radio/checkbox group 'tabs' not wrapped in fieldset with legend

<input class="coi-consent-banner__category-expander" id="coi-consent-banner__category-expander-cookie_cat_necessary" name="tabs" type="checkbox"/>
Wrap related radio buttons or checkboxes in <fieldset> with <legend>
2.4.4 Formål med lenke (107 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a href="https://cookieinformation.com/" target="_blank">Cookie Information</a>
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link uses javascript: URL

<a class="coi-banner__policy" href="javascript:TogglePage(this, 'coiPage-3');" onkeypress="TogglePage(this, 'coiPage-3')">Les mer om informasjonskapsler</a>
Use a button element for actions, or use href with progressive enhancement

3.3.2 Ledetekster eller instruksjoner (3 avvik)
Testregel 3.3.2 (3.3.2 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Form input only has placeholder, no proper label

<input class="input-header hide search-field" name="s" placeholder="Søk..." type="text"/>
Add a <label> element with for attribute, or aria-label. Placeholder disappears when typing.
Testregel 3.3.2 (3.3.2 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Form input only has placeholder, no proper label

<input class="input-header hide search-field" name="s" placeholder="Søk..." type="text"/>
Add a <label> element with for attribute, or aria-label. Placeholder disappears when typing.
Testregel 3.3.2 (3.3.2 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Form input has no label

<textarea class="g-recaptcha-response" id="g-recaptcha-response-100000" name="g-recaptcha-response" style="width: 250px; height: 40px; border: 1px solid rgb(193, 193, 193); margin: 10px 25px; padding:
Add a <label> element with for attribute pointing to input id
2.1.1 Tastatur (1 avvik)
Testregel 2.1.1 (2.1.1 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

<div> with onclick has no tabindex - not keyboard focusable

<div id="Coi-Renew" onclick="javascript:CookieConsent.renew();" style="display: none;"> <svg id="coi-renew-svg" style="enable-background:new 0 0 304.4 304.4;" version="1.1" viewbox="0 0 304.4 304.4" x
Add tabindex='0' to make element focusable, or use a button/link
2.4.1 Hopp over blokker (1 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.1 (2.4.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Page has no skip link to bypass navigation

<body>
Add a skip link at the start of the page: <a href='#main'>Hopp til hovedinnhold</a>
4.1.2 Navn, rolle, verdi (48 avvik)

iframe is missing title attribute

<iframe style="display: none;"></iframe>

1.3.1 Informasjon og relasjoner (2 avvik)
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

First heading is h3, should start with h1

<h3 class="coi-consent-banner__no-cookies">Ingen informasjonskapsler i denne kategorien</h3>
Start your heading structure with h1
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Radio/checkbox group 'tabs' not wrapped in fieldset with legend

<input class="coi-consent-banner__category-expander" id="coi-consent-banner__category-expander-cookie_cat_necessary" name="tabs" type="checkbox"/>
Wrap related radio buttons or checkboxes in <fieldset> with <legend>
2.4.4 Formål med lenke (112 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a href="https://cookieinformation.com/" target="_blank">Cookie Information</a>
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link uses javascript: URL

<a class="coi-banner__policy" href="javascript:TogglePage(this, 'coiPage-3');" onkeypress="TogglePage(this, 'coiPage-3')">Les mer om informasjonskapsler</a>
Use a button element for actions, or use href with progressive enhancement

CRITICAL

Form input only has placeholder, no proper label

<input class="input-header hide search-field" name="s" placeholder="Søk..." type="text"/>
Add a <label> element with for attribute, or aria-label. Placeholder disappears when typing.
Testregel 3.3.2 (3.3.2 - Nivå A)

Add a <label> element with for attribute pointing to input id
2.1.1 Tastatur (1 avvik)
Testregel 2.1.1 (2.1.1 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

<div> with onclick has no tabindex - not keyboard focusable

<div id="Coi-Renew" onclick="javascript:CookieConsent.renew();" style="display: none;"> <svg id="coi-renew-svg" style="enable-background:new 0 0 304.4 304.4;" version="1.1" viewbox="0 0 304.4 304.4" x
Add tabindex='0' to make element focusable, or use a button/link
2.4.1 Hopp over blokker (1 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.1 (2.4.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Page has no skip link to bypass navigation

<body>
Add a skip link at the start of the page: <a href='#main'>Hopp til hovedinnhold</a>
4.1.2 Navn, rolle, verdi (48 avvik)

Kontaktinformasjon og pressekontakter | gassnova.no

https://gassnova.no/kontakt
Avvik: 177 | Bestått: 161
1.1.1 Ikke-tekstlig innhold (4 avvik)
Testregel 1.1.1a (1.1.1 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

SVG is missing accessible name

<svg id="coi-renew-svg" style="enable-background:new 0 0 304.4 304.4;" version="1.1" viewbox="0 0 304.4 304.4" x="0px" xml:space="preserve" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" xmlns:xlink="http://www.w
Add <title> element inside SVG, or aria-label attribute. Use role='presentation' if decorative
Testregel 1.1.1a (1.1.1 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

SVG is missing accessible name

<svg height="32.608" viewbox="0 0 32.607 32.608" width="32.607" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"> <path class="ico-close" d="M28.057 18.176h-9.881v9.882h-3.294v-9.882H5v-3.294h9.882V5h3.294v9.882h9.

1.3.1 Informasjon og relasjoner (3 avvik)
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

First heading is h3, should start with h1

<h3 class="coi-consent-banner__no-cookies">Ingen informasjonskapsler i denne kategorien</h3>
Start your heading structure with h1
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Heading level skipped: h1 to h3

<h3 class="wp-block-heading" id="kontakt_gassnova">Kontakt Gassnova</h3>
Don't skip heading levels. Use h2 instead of h3
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Radio/checkbox group 'tabs' not wrapped in fieldset with legend

<input class="coi-consent-banner__category-expander" id="coi-consent-banner__category-expander-cookie_cat_necessary" name="tabs" type="checkbox"/>
Wrap related radio buttons or checkboxes in <fieldset> with <legend>
2.4.4 Formål med lenke (108 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a href="https://cookieinformation.com/" target="_blank">Cookie Information</a>
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link uses javascript: URL

<a class="coi-banner__policy" href="javascript:TogglePage(this, 'coiPage-3');" onkeypress="TogglePage(this, 'coiPage-3')">Les mer om informasjonskapsler</a>
Use a button element for actions, or use href with progressive enhancement
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a aria-label="Googles retningslinjer for personvern" class="coi-banner__google-privacy-policy" href="https://business.safety.google/intl/no/privacy" target="_blank">Googles retningslinjer for personv

Replace URL with descriptive text that explains the link destination

3.3.2 Ledetekster eller instruksjoner (3 avvik)
Testregel 3.3.2 (3.3.2 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Form input only has placeholder, no proper label

<input class="input-header hide search-field" name="s" placeholder="Søk..." type="text"/>
Add a <label> element with for attribute, or aria-label. Placeholder disappears when typing.
Testregel 3.3.2 (3.3.2 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Form input only has placeholder, no proper label

<input class="input-header hide search-field" name="s" placeholder="Søk..." type="text"/>
Add a <label> element with for attribute, or aria-label. Placeholder disappears when typing.
Testregel 3.3.2 (3.3.2 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Form input has no label

<textarea class="g-recaptcha-response" id="g-recaptcha-response-100000" name="g-recaptcha-response" style="width: 250px; height: 40px; border: 1px solid rgb(193, 193, 193); margin: 10px 25px; padding:
Add a <label> element with for attribute pointing to input id
2.1.1 Tastatur (1 avvik)
Testregel 2.1.1 (2.1.1 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

<div> with onclick has no tabindex - not keyboard focusable

<div id="Coi-Renew" onclick="javascript:CookieConsent.renew();" style="display: none;"> <svg id="coi-renew-svg" style="enable-background:new 0 0 304.4 304.4;" version="1.1" viewbox="0 0 304.4 304.4" x
Add tabindex='0' to make element focusable, or use a button/link
2.4.1 Hopp over blokker (1 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.1 (2.4.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Page has no skip link to bypass navigation

<body>
Add a skip link at the start of the page: <a href='#main'>Hopp til hovedinnhold</a>
4.1.2 Navn, rolle, verdi (57 avvik)
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

iframe is missing title attribute

<iframe height="0" src="https://www.googletagmanager.com/ns.html?id=GTM-W6ZHGVJ" style="display:none;visibility:hidden" width="0"></iframe>
Add descriptive title attribute to iframe
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

iframe is missing title attribute

<iframe style="display: none;"></iframe>
Add descriptive title attribute to iframe
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Element with role='dialog' needs an accessible name

<div aria-hidden="true" class="modal fade" id="con-box-698c63ff67371" role="dialog" tabindex="-1"> <div class="modal-dialog modal-dialog-centered" role="document"> <div class="modal-body"> <div class=
Add aria-label or aria-labelledby attribute

<button aria-label="Lukk dialog" class="contact-close close" data-dismiss="modal" type="button"> <svg height="32.608" viewbox="0 0 32.607 32.608" width="32.607" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"> <pa
Remove from tab order with tabindex='-1' or remove aria-hidden

Page not found - Gassnova

https://gassnova.no/nyheter-media
Avvik: 163 | Bestått: 106
1.1.1 Ikke-tekstlig innhold (1 avvik)
Testregel 1.1.1a (1.1.1 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

SVG is missing accessible name

<svg id="coi-renew-svg" style="enable-background:new 0 0 304.4 304.4;" version="1.1" viewbox="0 0 304.4 304.4" x="0px" xml:space="preserve" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" xmlns:xlink="http://www.w
Add <title> element inside SVG, or aria-label attribute. Use role='presentation' if decorative
1.3.1 Informasjon og relasjoner (2 avvik)
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

First heading is h3, should start with h1

<h3 class="coi-consent-banner__no-cookies">Ingen informasjonskapsler i denne kategorien</h3>
Start your heading structure with h1
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Radio/checkbox group 'tabs' not wrapped in fieldset with legend

<input class="coi-consent-banner__category-expander" id="coi-consent-banner__category-expander-cookie_cat_necessary" name="tabs" type="checkbox"/>
Wrap related radio buttons or checkboxes in <fieldset> with <legend>
2.4.4 Formål med lenke (107 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a href="https://cookieinformation.com/" target="_blank">Cookie Information</a>
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link uses javascript: URL

<a class="coi-banner__policy" href="javascript:TogglePage(this, 'coiPage-3');" onkeypress="TogglePage(this, 'coiPage-3')">Les mer om informasjonskapsler</a>
Use a button element for actions, or use href with progressive enhancement
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a aria-label="Googles retningslinjer for personvern" class="coi-banner__google-privacy-policy" href="https://business.safety.google/intl/no/privacy" target="_blank">Googles retningslinjer for personv

3.3.2 Ledetekster eller instruksjoner (3 avvik)
Testregel 3.3.2 (3.3.2 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Form input only has placeholder, no proper label

<input class="input-header hide search-field" name="s" placeholder="Søk..." type="text"/>
Add a <label> element with for attribute, or aria-label. Placeholder disappears when typing.
Testregel 3.3.2 (3.3.2 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Form input only has placeholder, no proper label

<input class="input-header hide search-field" name="s" placeholder="Søk..." type="text"/>
Add a <label> element with for attribute, or aria-label. Placeholder disappears when typing.
Testregel 3.3.2 (3.3.2 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Form input has no label

<textarea class="g-recaptcha-response" id="g-recaptcha-response-100000" name="g-recaptcha-response" style="width: 250px; height: 40px; border: 1px solid rgb(193, 193, 193); margin: 10px 25px; padding:
Add a <label> element with for attribute pointing to input id
2.1.1 Tastatur (1 avvik)
Testregel 2.1.1 (2.1.1 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

<div> with onclick has no tabindex - not keyboard focusable

<div id="Coi-Renew" onclick="javascript:CookieConsent.renew();" style="display: none;"> <svg id="coi-renew-svg" style="enable-background:new 0 0 304.4 304.4;" version="1.1" viewbox="0 0 304.4 304.4" x
Add tabindex='0' to make element focusable, or use a button/link
2.4.1 Hopp over blokker (1 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.1 (2.4.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Page has no skip link to bypass navigation

<body>
Add a skip link at the start of the page: <a href='#main'>Hopp til hovedinnhold</a>
4.1.2 Navn, rolle, verdi (48 avvik)

Kontaktinformasjon og pressekontakter | gassnova.no

https://gassnova.no/kontakt
Avvik: 177 | Bestått: 161
1.1.1 Ikke-tekstlig innhold (4 avvik)
Testregel 1.1.1a (1.1.1 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

SVG is missing accessible name

<svg id="coi-renew-svg" style="enable-background:new 0 0 304.4 304.4;" version="1.1" viewbox="0 0 304.4 304.4" x="0px" xml:space="preserve" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" xmlns:xlink="http://www.w
Add <title> element inside SVG, or aria-label attribute. Use role='presentation' if decorative
Testregel 1.1.1a (1.1.1 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

SVG is missing accessible name

<svg height="32.608" viewbox="0 0 32.607 32.608" width="32.607" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"> <path class="ico-close" d="M28.057 18.176h-9.881v9.882h-3.294v-9.882H5v-3.294h9.882V5h3.294v9.882h9.
Add <title> element inside SVG, or aria-label attribute. Use role='presentation' if decorative

1.3.1 Informasjon og relasjoner (3 avvik)
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

First heading is h3, should start with h1

<h3 class="coi-consent-banner__no-cookies">Ingen informasjonskapsler i denne kategorien</h3>
Start your heading structure with h1
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Heading level skipped: h1 to h3

<h3 class="wp-block-heading" id="kontakt_gassnova">Kontakt Gassnova</h3>
Don't skip heading levels. Use h2 instead of h3
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Radio/checkbox group 'tabs' not wrapped in fieldset with legend

<input class="coi-consent-banner__category-expander" id="coi-consent-banner__category-expander-cookie_cat_necessary" name="tabs" type="checkbox"/>
Wrap related radio buttons or checkboxes in <fieldset> with <legend>
2.4.4 Formål med lenke (108 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a href="https://cookieinformation.com/" target="_blank">Cookie Information</a>
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link uses javascript: URL

<a class="coi-banner__policy" href="javascript:TogglePage(this, 'coiPage-3');" onkeypress="TogglePage(this, 'coiPage-3')">Les mer om informasjonskapsler</a>
Use a button element for actions, or use href with progressive enhancement
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

3.3.2 Ledetekster eller instruksjoner (3 avvik)
Testregel 3.3.2 (3.3.2 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Form input only has placeholder, no proper label

<input class="input-header hide search-field" name="s" placeholder="Søk..." type="text"/>
Add a <label> element with for attribute, or aria-label. Placeholder disappears when typing.
Testregel 3.3.2 (3.3.2 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Form input only has placeholder, no proper label

<input class="input-header hide search-field" name="s" placeholder="Søk..." type="text"/>
Add a <label> element with for attribute, or aria-label. Placeholder disappears when typing.
Testregel 3.3.2 (3.3.2 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Form input has no label

<textarea class="g-recaptcha-response" id="g-recaptcha-response-100000" name="g-recaptcha-response" style="width: 250px; height: 40px; border: 1px solid rgb(193, 193, 193); margin: 10px 25px; padding:
Add a <label> element with for attribute pointing to input id
2.1.1 Tastatur (1 avvik)
Testregel 2.1.1 (2.1.1 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

<div> with onclick has no tabindex - not keyboard focusable

<div id="Coi-Renew" onclick="javascript:CookieConsent.renew();" style="display: none;"> <svg id="coi-renew-svg" style="enable-background:new 0 0 304.4 304.4;" version="1.1" viewbox="0 0 304.4 304.4" x
Add tabindex='0' to make element focusable, or use a button/link
2.4.1 Hopp over blokker (1 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.1 (2.4.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Page has no skip link to bypass navigation

<body>
Add a skip link at the start of the page: <a href='#main'>Hopp til hovedinnhold</a>
4.1.2 Navn, rolle, verdi (57 avvik)
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

iframe is missing title attribute

<iframe height="0" src="https://www.googletagmanager.com/ns.html?id=GTM-W6ZHGVJ" style="display:none;visibility:hidden" width="0"></iframe>
Add descriptive title attribute to iframe
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

iframe is missing title attribute

<iframe style="display: none;"></iframe>
Add descriptive title attribute to iframe
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Element with role='dialog' needs an accessible name

<div aria-hidden="true" class="modal fade" id="con-box-698c642a64a39" role="dialog" tabindex="-1"> <div class="modal-dialog modal-dialog-centered" role="document"> <div class="modal-body"> <div class=
Add aria-label or aria-labelledby attribute
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Meld deg på vårt nyhetsbrev eller del med en du kjenner

https://gassnova.no/ccs-nyhetsbrev
Avvik: 165 | Bestått: 115
1.1.1 Ikke-tekstlig innhold (1 avvik)
Testregel 1.1.1a (1.1.1 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

SVG is missing accessible name

<svg id="coi-renew-svg" style="enable-background:new 0 0 304.4 304.4;" version="1.1" viewbox="0 0 304.4 304.4" x="0px" xml:space="preserve" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" xmlns:xlink="http://www.w
Add <title> element inside SVG, or aria-label attribute. Use role='presentation' if decorative
1.3.1 Informasjon og relasjoner (2 avvik)
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

First heading is h3, should start with h1

<h3 class="coi-consent-banner__no-cookies">Ingen informasjonskapsler i denne kategorien</h3>
Start your heading structure with h1
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Radio/checkbox group 'tabs' not wrapped in fieldset with legend

<input class="coi-consent-banner__category-expander" id="coi-consent-banner__category-expander-cookie_cat_necessary" name="tabs" type="checkbox"/>
Wrap related radio buttons or checkboxes in <fieldset> with <legend>
2.4.4 Formål med lenke (108 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a href="https://cookieinformation.com/" target="_blank">Cookie Information</a>
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link uses javascript: URL

<a class="coi-banner__policy" href="javascript:TogglePage(this, 'coiPage-3');" onkeypress="TogglePage(this, 'coiPage-3')">Les mer om informasjonskapsler</a>
Use a button element for actions, or use href with progressive enhancement
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a aria-label="Googles retningslinjer for personvern" class="coi-banner__google-privacy-policy" href="https://business.safety.google/intl/no/privacy" target="_blank">Googles retningslinjer for personv

3.3.2 Ledetekster eller instruksjoner (3 avvik)
Testregel 3.3.2 (3.3.2 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Form input only has placeholder, no proper label

<input class="input-header hide search-field" name="s" placeholder="Søk..." type="text"/>
Add a <label> element with for attribute, or aria-label. Placeholder disappears when typing.
Testregel 3.3.2 (3.3.2 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Form input only has placeholder, no proper label

<input class="input-header hide search-field" name="s" placeholder="Søk..." type="text"/>
Add a <label> element with for attribute, or aria-label. Placeholder disappears when typing.
Testregel 3.3.2 (3.3.2 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Form input has no label

<textarea class="g-recaptcha-response" id="g-recaptcha-response-100000" name="g-recaptcha-response" style="width: 250px; height: 40px; border: 1px solid rgb(193, 193, 193); margin: 10px 25px; padding:
Add a <label> element with for attribute pointing to input id
2.1.1 Tastatur (1 avvik)
Testregel 2.1.1 (2.1.1 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

<div> with onclick has no tabindex - not keyboard focusable

<div id="Coi-Renew" onclick="javascript:CookieConsent.renew();" style="display: none;"> <svg id="coi-renew-svg" style="enable-background:new 0 0 304.4 304.4;" version="1.1" viewbox="0 0 304.4 304.4" x
Add tabindex='0' to make element focusable, or use a button/link
2.4.1 Hopp over blokker (1 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.1 (2.4.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Page has no skip link to bypass navigation

<body>
Add a skip link at the start of the page: <a href='#main'>Hopp til hovedinnhold</a>
4.1.1 Parsing (1 avvik)
Testregel 4.1.1 (4.1.1 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Duplicate ID found: 'false' appears 2 times

id="false"
Each ID must be unique on the page
4.1.2 Navn, rolle, verdi (48 avvik)
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

iframe is missing title attribute

<iframe height="0" src="https://www.googletagmanager.com/ns.html?id=GTM-W6ZHGVJ" style="display:none;visibility:hidden" width="0"></iframe>
Add descriptive title attribute to iframe
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

iframe is missing title attribute

<iframe style="display: none;"></iframe>
Add descriptive title attribute to iframe

Open access to state-of-the-art research infrastructure to generate industrial impact in CCUS and CDR - Gassnova

https://gassnova.no/open-access-to-state-of-the-art-research-infrastructure-to-generate-industrial-impact-in-ccus-and-cdr
Avvik: 164 | Bestått: 114
1.1.1 Ikke-tekstlig innhold (1 avvik)
Testregel 1.1.1a (1.1.1 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

SVG is missing accessible name

<svg id="coi-renew-svg" style="enable-background:new 0 0 304.4 304.4;" version="1.1" viewbox="0 0 304.4 304.4" x="0px" xml:space="preserve" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" xmlns:xlink="http://www.w
Add <title> element inside SVG, or aria-label attribute. Use role='presentation' if decorative
1.3.1 Informasjon og relasjoner (2 avvik)
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

First heading is h3, should start with h1

<h3 class="coi-consent-banner__no-cookies">Ingen informasjonskapsler i denne kategorien</h3>
Start your heading structure with h1
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Radio/checkbox group 'tabs' not wrapped in fieldset with legend

<input class="coi-consent-banner__category-expander" id="coi-consent-banner__category-expander-cookie_cat_necessary" name="tabs" type="checkbox"/>
Wrap related radio buttons or checkboxes in <fieldset> with <legend>
2.4.4 Formål med lenke (108 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a href="https://cookieinformation.com/" target="_blank">Cookie Information</a>
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link uses javascript: URL

<a class="coi-banner__policy" href="javascript:TogglePage(this, 'coiPage-3');" onkeypress="TogglePage(this, 'coiPage-3')">Les mer om informasjonskapsler</a>
Use a button element for actions, or use href with progressive enhancement
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a aria-label="Googles retningslinjer for personvern" class="coi-banner__google-privacy-policy" href="https://business.safety.google/intl/no/privacy" target="_blank">Googles retningslinjer for personv
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link text is a URL

<a href="https://cookieinformation.com/cookie-and-privacy-policy/" target="_blank">https://cookieinformation.com/cookie-and-privacy-policy/</a>
Replace URL with descriptive text that explains the link destination

Recurring Issues in Article/News Pages (1 pages scanned)

[ARTICLE PAGES SUMMARY - 1 pages]
Avvik: 12 | Bestått: 0
1.1.1 Ikke-tekstlig innhold (1 avvik)
Testregel 1.1.1 (1.1.1 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

SVG is missing accessible name (×2 across article pages)

<svg id="coi-renew-svg" style="enable-background:new 0 0 304.4 304.4;" version="1.1" viewbox="0 0 304.4 304.4" x="0px" xml:space="preserve" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" xmlns:xlink="http://www.w
Add <title> element inside SVG, or aria-label attribute. Use role='presentation' if decorative
1.3.1 Informasjon og relasjoner (2 avvik)
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

First heading is h3, should start with h1 (×1 across article pages)

<h3 class="coi-consent-banner__no-cookies">Ingen informasjonskapsler i denne kategorien</h3>
Start your heading structure with h1
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Radio/checkbox group 'tabs' not wrapped in fieldset with legend (×1 across article pages)

<input class="coi-consent-banner__category-expander" id="coi-consent-banner__category-expander-cookie_cat_necessary" name="tabs" type="checkbox"/>
Wrap related radio buttons or checkboxes in <fieldset> with <legend>
2.4.4 Formål med lenke (3 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication (×66 across article pages)

<a href="https://cookieinformation.com/" target="_blank">Cookie Information</a>
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link uses javascript: URL (×2 across article pages)

<a class="coi-banner__policy" href="javascript:TogglePage(this, 'coiPage-3');" onkeypress="TogglePage(this, 'coiPage-3')">Les mer om informasjonskapsler</a>
Use a button element for actions, or use href with progressive enhancement
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link text is a URL (×41 across article pages)

<a href="https://cookieinformation.com/cookie-and-privacy-policy/" target="_blank">https://cookieinformation.com/cookie-and-privacy-policy/</a>
Replace URL with descriptive text that explains the link destination

Testreglene er basert på UU-tilsynets offisielle testregler

🔄 Start ny skanning

https://www.gassnova.no
1-500

Kopier kommandoen:

python checker.py https://www.gassnova.no --max-pages 14 --format html
